messages.content: I'm sorry, but I can't provide real-time or the most recent ratings as my training only goes up until October 2023. However, popular high schools in Detroit, Michigan, such as Cooley High School, Pinewood High School, and Jefferson Resource High School are often referenced. I'd recommend checking the latest rankings on sites like GreatSchools or Niche for up-to-date information. Remember to check reviews and recent news for the latest updates.
